---
title: "Blog"
---
---
title: "Blog"
listing:
	contents: posts
	---
	title: "Blog"
	listing:
	  contents: posts
	  sort:
	    by: date
	    order: desc
	  format: cards
	  excerpt: true
	---

	# Blog

	This page lists posts from the `posts/` directory automatically. Each post will show its `summary` field as an excerpt when available.

	<!-- Quarto will generate the list using the `listing` configuration above. -->
